calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-31-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-04-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendant William Rose & Associates, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant on October 8, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on October 8, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on December 1, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendant William Rose & Associates, Inc. follows:

Damages/Principal - $71,782.99.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,793.14.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $384.00, for a total of $77,460.13.

It is further Ordered that plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the leased equipment set for in paragraph three of the judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
